title: [codereview] reply not queued after process_rpl
description: process_rpl and forward_mesh_to_upstream now use reply_len but drop the reply_buf content instead of queuing to SLIP TX (sim tx_send or slip.queue_send). Echo replies and potential DIS responses are lost. Must return reply or provide TX callback. P2. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-r83o
close_reason: Fixed reply queuing, added TX for echo/DIS via updated forward and RplNode integration; 3 codereview passes clean
